applicationComponents.name: Enterprise CPMS
applicationComponents.description: Application component supporting the Enterprise CPMS service landscape.

applicationServices.name: Web Portal
applicationServices.description: Primary operations workspace for charge point onboarding, monitoring, remote actions, and network administration.

applicationServices.name: Public API
applicationServices.description: Controlled API surface for site, charger, availability, and interoperability data exchange with external systems.

applicationServices.name: Partner Integrations
applicationServices.description: Integration interfaces for roaming hubs, enterprise systems, and acquired backend landscapes.

applicationComponents.name: Roaming & Settlement Hub
applicationComponents.description: Application component supporting the Roaming & Settlement Hub service landscape.

applicationServices.name: Public API
applicationServices.description: External API surface for roaming connectivity, authorization, and transaction exchange.

applicationServices.name: Partner Portal
applicationServices.description: Operational portal for partner onboarding, issue handling, and settlement transparency.

applicationServices.name: API
applicationServices.description: Machine-to-machine interfaces for session authorization, CDR exchange, and dispute workflows.

applicationComponents.name: EV Driver Experience
applicationComponents.description: Application component supporting the EV Driver Experience service landscape.

applicationServices.name: iOS
applicationServices.description: Native iOS app for charger discovery, session control, pricing transparency, and receipts.

applicationServices.name: Android
applicationServices.description: Native Android app for locating chargers, starting sessions, and managing charging history.

applicationServices.name: Web App
applicationServices.description: Browser-based experience for account access, receipts, support, and trip planning.

applicationComponents.name: Fleet Charging & Energy Manager
applicationComponents.description: Application component supporting the Fleet Charging & Energy Manager service landscape.

applicationServices.name: Web Portal
applicationServices.description: Primary fleet workspace for access control, charging policy management, reimbursement, and cost analytics.

applicationServices.name: Public API
applicationServices.description: External APIs for fleet data exchange, policy integration, and cross-system reporting.

applicationServices.name: ERP Integrations
applicationServices.description: Enterprise integration interfaces for expense, HR, accounting, and reimbursement systems.

applicationInteractions.description: Enterprise CPMS exchanges domain information with Roaming & Settlement Hub as part of the end-to-end operating model.
Roaming & Settlement Hub exchanges domain information with EV Driver Experience as part of the end-to-end operating model.
EV Driver Experience exchanges domain information with Fleet Charging & Energy Manager as part of the end-to-end operating model.
